top_10_high_priority.recommended_action: IMMEDIATE LEDGER SUSPENSION! Critical identity anomalies (missing or duplicate transaction IDs) detected. Freeze the accounting sub-ledger, halt payment processing, and perform a manual database key reconciliation.; [RV-01] - Verify original booking form. Patched transaction ID assigned. Reconcile with ERP sequence logs.; [RV-04] - Halt transaction. Missing Unit ID. Reconcile with property registry.; [RV-07] - Identity Format Alert. Non-standard customer ID format. Perform KYC verification.; [RV-14] - Over-collection Flag. Reconcile collected amount; check if refund is required.; [RV-24] - Temporal Anomaly. Payment logged prior to demand date. Verify CRM logging latency.; [RV-25] - Date mismatch. payment_delay_days does not match calendar date difference. Audit trigger latency.; [RV-32] - Verify holiday/weekend collection voucher. Confirm bank clearings and check deposit timestamps.; [SOP-Z-COLLECTED_AMOUNT] - Verify large cash collection voucher against corresponding bank deposit receipts.; [SOP-IQR-OUTLIER] - Statistical IQR Bounds Outlier: collected_amount (IQR=13554949.75); [SOP-ML-OUTLIER] - ML Outlier Reconciliations: Abnormal combination of abnormal invoice-to-payment window and Temporal Behavior
